groups.label: Transport and Food Delivery
groups.explanation: This group contains ride-hailing services (Uber, Bolt) and food delivery (Uber Eats), which are related but distinct services. The items mostly belong together due to the semantic meaning of transport and food delivery, but the category could be more specific.

groups.label: Subscriptions and Purchases
groups.explanation: This group contains various subscription and purchase transactions, including streaming services (Netflix), retail purchases (Shoprite), and telecommunications services (Airtel, MTN). The items do not necessarily belong together due to the broad range of services, but they share a common theme of being consumer expenses.

groups.label: Cloud Services and Fees
groups.explanation: This group contains transactions related to cloud services (Amazon Web Services) and payment processing fees (Paystack transfer fee). The items clearly belong together due to their semantic meaning, which is related to business expenses and online services.

groups.label: Payouts
groups.explanation: This is a singleton group containing only one item, which is a payout transaction from Flutterwave. It does not fit into the other categories and appears to be a distinct type of transaction.
